11    XPROG REPORT PC 1370,01/CAL:FOR HEARING ON PLACEMENT REPORT AND COMMITMENT PURSUANT TO PC 1370,01(A)(2)(A) AND FOR HEARING CONCERNING ANTIPSYCHOTIC MEDICATION PURSANT TO PC 1370,01(A)(2)(B),/1370COM1/X: BASED ON THE RECOMMENDATION OF JAIL AFTERCARE SERVICES, THE COURT ORDERS THAT THE DEFENDANT BE RELEASED TO JAIL AFTERCARE SERVICES FOR PLACEMENT IN OUT-PATIENT TREATMENT,  TRANSPORATION IS TO BE PROVIDED BY SAN FRANCISCO SHERIFF'S DEPARTMENT UNLESS OTHER ARRANGEMENTS HAVE BEEN MADE,/MAX TERM:  1 YEAR/CTS: 100/CPSSCOM/1370,01PLC1/1370,01PLC3/1370,01PLC4/1370,01PLC5: MAY 11, 2009/X:AFTER HEARING, THE COURT FINDS THAT THE DEFENDANT CONSENTS TO THE ADMINISTRATION OF ANTIPSYCHOTIC MEDICATION,  THE COURT ORDERS THAT ANTIPSYCHOTICMEDICATION MAY BE GIVEN TO THE DEFENDANT AS PRESCRIBED BY A TREATING PSYCHIATRIST PURSUANT TO THE DEFENDANT'S CONSENT,  IF THE DEFENDANT WITHDRAWS CONSENTFOR ANTIPSYCHOTIC MEDICATION, AFTER THE TREATING PSYCHIATRIST COMPLIESWITHTHE PROVISIONS OF PC 1370,01(A)(2)(C), THE DEFENDANT SHALL BE RETURNEDTO COURT FOR A HEARING REGARDING WHETHER ANTIPSYCHOTIC MEDICATION SHALL BE ADMINISTERED INVOLUNTARILY,/X: THE COMMITMENTS IN THIS CASE AND IN CASE #2345716 ARE CONCURRENT,/CONTD: TO 11-19-08 FOR 1370,01(B)PC PROGRESS REPORT FROM JAIL AFTERCARE/
